prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is F-101 Structural framing within 2.6 Carpentry & Finishes. The relevant subcategory is 2.6.1 Rough Framing. The observed field condition is: undersized header (span vs. table - ME+DOC). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IRC R502, R602.
title: T3 F-101 Code/spec compliance
